analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet only states that it is useful for China and the US to draw up three lists, without specifying content or evaluative language. Assessment per narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – not promoted; there is no criticism of the US or the West. CH2 (China benevolent) – not promoted; no mention of peaceful development, multilateralism, or mutual benefit. CH3 (epic history) – not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values) – not referenced; no domestic governance/value claims. CH5 (CCP succeeds) – not referenced; no achievement claims. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – not relevant. Conclusion: No listed narratives are clearly promoted.
